message:
perf(vdbe,connection): set_reg_int fast path, precompute has_insert, throttle oracle refresh

VDBE engine: replace 8 `set_reg(p, SqliteValue::Integer(v))` calls with
`set_reg_int(p, v)` to skip the enum wrapping overhead on hot integer
register writes (Count, Sequence, DecrJumpZero, etc.).

ProgramBuilder: precompute the `has_insert` flag at build time so
`has_insert_ops()` is O(1) instead of scanning every opcode per execution.

Connection: throttle e-process oracle refresh to every 64 statements —
the oracle's cache/SSI metrics are statistical signals that don't need
per-statement granularity; sampling every 64 ops eliminates ~60 atomic
loads and a mutex acquire per statement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
